# DESCRIBE query, Turtle response.
endpoint: sparql_query
classification: spec-required
match_mode: status-only
description: DESCRIBE returns 200 + text/turtle content-type

=== request
GET /sparql?query=DESCRIBE%20%3Chttp%3A%2F%2Fexample.org%2Fa%3E
Accept: text/turtle

=== response
200
Content-Type: text/turtle
